skills-maintenance.notes: Local maintenance skill for inventory, provenance, and update workflows.

superpowers: Project-facing default paths were neutralized from superpowers-branded names to agent-branded names.
Check git status in ~/.codex/superpowers before pulling updates.
wshobson-agents-extracted: This origin tracks Codex-native local extractions derived from wshobson/agents rather than verbatim upstream copies.

The agent-coordination collection comes primarily from plugins/agent-teams and preserves team sizing, multi-reviewer review, competing-hypothesis debugging, parallel feature decomposition, and dependency coordination patterns.

The comprehensive-review collection comes primarily from plugins/comprehensive-review and preserves broad repo-health review passes for code quality, architecture, security, performance, testing, documentation, and final reporting.
Claude-specific runtime assumptions were intentionally removed during extraction, including teammate runtime, slash-command orchestration, checkpoint state files, and plugin-local agent semantics.
Source analysis and design documents for this extraction live in /tmp/wshobson-agents/docs/agent/ and should be updated alongside the skills when the extraction changes.
orchestra: Canonical upstream copies now live in ~/.orchestra/skills, with Orchestra-managed entries in ~/.codex/skills relinked to that tree.
The upstream welcome flow is mirrored with a Codex-only relink so unrelated agent configs are left untouched.

autoresearch.notes: Trigger narrowed to explicit-only activation and an Activation Gate was added.
